study_title: Metatranscriptome analysis of sympatric bee species identifies variants of bee infecting viruses, and a novel RNA virus primarily associated with Andrena
exp_title: RNA-Seq of Apis mellifera: library B_honey_bee_virus_aug
design: Lysates from 44 bees was RNAse treated (50 U Benzoase (Sigma) and 40 U RNase I (Thermo)). RNAse treatment augmented for (viral) encapsidated nucleic acids. > library constructed using TruSeq Stranded mRNAseq sample prep (without polyA selection or additional rRNA removal) (barcoded to distinguish from other samples in same lane) > 2 x 100 nt Illumina HiSeq 4000 sequencing.
lab: Department of Plant Sciences and Plant Pathology
